assertions.description: Element.scrollTo returns a Promise when called with behavior: 'smooth'.
assertions.test: (() => { const e = document.createElement('div'); const p = e.scrollTo({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'}); return p instanceof Promise; })()

assertions.description: Element.scrollBy returns a Promise when called with behavior: 'smooth'.
assertions.test: (() => { const e = document.createElement('div'); const p = e.scrollBy({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'}); return p instanceof Promise; })()

assertions.description: Element.scrollIntoView returns a Promise when called with behavior: 'smooth'.
assertions.test: (() => { const e = document.createElement('div'); const p = e.scrollIntoView({behavior: 'smooth'}); return p instanceof Promise; })()

assertions.description: window.scrollTo returns a Promise when called with behavior: 'smooth'.
assertions.test: (() => { const p = window.scrollTo({top: 0, behavior: 'smooth'}); return p instanceof Promise; })()
